Container.Name: twitch-miner-go
Container.Overview: Twitch Channel Points Miner - Automatically earn Twitch channel points by simulating viewer presence. Features: Passive point farming, automatic bonus claiming, watch streak detection, raid following, prediction betting, game drops tracking, moments claiming, and real-time analytics dashboard.
Container.Description: Twitch Channel Points Miner - Automatically earn Twitch channel points by simulating viewer presence. Features: Passive point farming, automatic bonus claiming, watch streak detection, raid following, prediction betting, game drops tracking, moments claiming, and real-time analytics dashboard.

Config.Name: Analytics Port
Config.Description: Port for the analytics web dashboard. Only needed if enableAnalytics is true in config.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Path to configuration directory. Place your config.json here.

Config.Name: Cookies
Config.Description: Path to store authentication cookies/tokens. Persists login between restarts.

Config.Name: Database
Config.Description: Path to store database files (analytics, notifications, etc.).

Config.Name: Dashboard Username
Config.Description: Username for the dashboard's HTTP Basic Auth. REQUIRED: the container binds the dashboard to all interfaces, and the miner refuses to start on a non-loopback bind without credentials (unless Dashboard Insecure No Auth is set).

Config.Name: Dashboard Password
Config.Description: Password for the dashboard's HTTP Basic Auth. See Dashboard Username.

Config.Name: Dashboard Insecure No Auth
Config.Description: Set to true to explicitly run the dashboard WITHOUT authentication on a trusted network. Not recommended; prefer setting Dashboard Username/Password.
